posts.author: marcepz (Ana Marcela Perez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I would like to propose being able to download comments that have been added to files. Right now the only way to view comments is if you have access to monday, but I have had the need to share some docs with external parties and since I cannot grant access to everyone on monday, the annotations we make are lost and have to be added separatley to be able to send to clients.

This way, if a file (pdf, doc, images) have comments on them the comments would download with the file. I imagine there would have to be an option to download without the comments as well.

posts.author: Siobhan.Taylor (Siobhan Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this feature would be so valuable! We have stakeholders that aren’t currently using Monday and re-adding annotations (20+ at times) is a big time-drain.
